codeReview.summary: The reviewed commit cleanly aligns the three requested docs/library surfaces with the dispatch hard-cut: `docs/modules/orchestrator.md`, `docs/deprecated/INDEX.md`, and `.factory/library/frontend-handoff.md` no longer present `DispatchRequest` or `dispatchBatch` as live seams, and the surviving guidance consistently points readers to `POST /api/v1/dispatch/confirm`, which still matches `DispatchController` and `openapi.json`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: A retained validation artifact still teaches the retired dispatch shortcut with an outdated canonical pointer, so it competes with the cleaned dispatch docs/library story.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/validation/remove-noncanonical-dispatch-path/user-testing/flows/orchestrator-cleanup.json:20 still says `CommandDispatcher.dispatchBatch throws OrchestratorFeatureDisabledException with /api/v1/sales/dispatch/confirm`, while the reviewed docs and current OpenAPI/controller truth point to `POST /api/v1/dispatch/confirm`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared guidance is ambiguous about how `.factory/library/*`-only docs packets should be validated, which led this docs feature to run `gate_fast.sh` even though the feature-specific proof pack was the narrower docs lint plus dispatch contract guards.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md:37-45 defines a docs-only lane with `bash ci/lint-knowledgebase.sh` as the sole validator; `.factory/skills/docs-worker/SKILL.md:53-54` says docs-only features should avoid repo-wide runtime proof unless required; but the worker handoff for session `641d8e87-9de0-454d-8893-79733f5c7af8` records an additional `bash scripts/gate_fast.sh` run before the required docs checks.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the feature metadata, worker handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit diff, then checked the edited docs/library surfaces against `DispatchController` and `openapi.json`. The implementation satisfies the requested dispatch hard-cut alignment with no blocking issues; I also recorded one stale validation artifact and one docs-worker validation-guidance ambiguity for scrutiny triage.
